text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump stated that he is considering the possibility of a naval blockade of Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普表示，他正在考虑对伊朗实施海军封锁的可能性。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 “Americans need this agreement more than we do” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi exclusively to RT “If they don’t accept our terms, we’ll go our own way — nothing will change”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “美国人比我们更需要这份协议” —— 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）独家对今日俄罗斯（RT）表示：“如果他们不接受我们的条件，我们将走自己的路——什么都不会改变。”

text: WarTranslated Peter Magyar says if Tisza wins he will cap the prime minister’s tenure at two terms. He says about 60 reports of election fraud have already come in. Turnout at 9 AM hit a record 16.98 percent, the National Election Office says. Orban said he came to win, while Peter Magyar framed the vote as a choice between East and West and warned Fidesz may stage fraud and provocations. Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 3.46% by 7 AM, a record and nearly double the same hour four years ago. The main race is Fidesz vs Tisza with Peter Magyar leading in polls, a pivotal vote for Hungary and for Orban. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）表示，如果蒂萨党（Tisza）获胜，他将把总理任期限制在两届。他说，已经收到约60起选举舞弊的报告。据国家选举办公室称，上午9点的投票率达到了创纪录的16.98%。欧尔班表示他是来赢的，而彼得·马扎尔则将此次投票描述为东西方之间的选择，并警告青民盟（Fidesz）可能会制造舞弊和挑衅。匈牙利议会选举上午7点的投票率达到3.46%，创下历史新高，几乎是四年前同一时间的双倍。主要竞争是青民盟对阵蒂萨党，彼得·马扎尔在民调中领先，这对匈牙利和欧尔班来说是一次关键的投票。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Kyiv reported that Russia violated the Easter ceasefire 2,299 times, while Moscow claimed Ukraine committed 1,971 violations. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043246308249546930/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 基辅报告称俄罗斯违反复活节停火协议2,299次，而莫斯科声称乌克兰违反了1,971次。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043246308249546930/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW Alerts in northern Israel over Hezbollah attack tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列北部因真主党袭击发出警报 推文

text: Open Source Intel China has denied supplying weapons to Iran, with its embassy in Washington calling the allegations incorrect https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043241857224765489/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中国否认向伊朗提供武器，其驻华盛顿大使馆称这些指控不属实 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043241857224765489/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Budanov says a new POW exchange could happen by the end of the week. April 11 was just the start of the Easter POW exchange, with more releases ahead, says Andriy Yusov, deputy head of Ukraine’s POW coordination HQ. He adds humanitarian initiatives were rejected, but the work goes on. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 布达诺夫（Budanov）表示，新的战俘交换可能在本周末进行。乌克兰战俘协调总部副主任安德烈·尤索夫（Andriy Yusov）表示，4月11日只是复活节战俘交换的开始，未来还会有更多人员获释。他补充说，人道主义倡议虽然被拒绝，但工作仍在继续。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ U.S.-Iran talks have ended without success, with no peace agreement reached. Vance stated this is worse news for Tehran than for Washington. 📌 “They chose not to accept our terms — we worked for 21 hours. We had substantive discussions… The bad news is we failed to reach an agreement.” 🟦 Vance appears unmoved by what he described as misleading rhetoric from Iran’s leadership, which he suggested believes it holds the advantage. 📌 “The simple fact is we need clear confirmation that they will not pursue nuclear weapons or the capabilities to rapidly develop them.” 🇮🇷 Iran also confirmed that negotiations in Islamabad ended without a deal, blaming Washington’s “excessive demands” for the lack of progress. 🟥 Reports indicate the main points of contention were transit rights in the Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s nuclear program. 🇺🇸 U.S. negotiators have already left Pakistan after the high-stakes talks collapsed, leaving key disputes unresolved. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 美伊会谈以失败告终，未达成和平协议。万斯（Vance）表示，这对德黑兰来说比对华盛顿来说是更糟糕的消息。 📌 “他们选择不接受我们的条件——我们工作了21个小时。我们进行了实质性的讨论……坏消息是我们未能达成协议。” 🟦 万斯似乎对他所描述的伊朗领导层误导性言论不为所动，他暗示伊朗领导层认为自己占据优势。 📌 “简单的事实是，我们需要明确的确认，他们不会追求核武器或快速开发核武器的能力。” 🇮🇷 伊朗也证实伊斯兰堡的谈判没有达成协议，并将缺乏进展归咎于华盛顿的“过分要求”。 🟥 报告显示，主要的争议点是霍尔木兹海峡的过境权和伊朗的核计划。 🇺🇸 在高风险谈判破裂后，美国谈判代表已经离开巴基斯坦，关键争议仍未解决。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 RT exclusive: “All vessels entering the Strait of Hormuz must pay tolls under a new control system” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi “Government must establish full management and control of the Strait based on national interests”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 RT独家：“根据新的控制系统，所有进入霍尔木兹海峡的船只必须支付通行费” —— 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）“政府必须基于国家利益对海峡进行全面管理和控制”

text: 🇮🇷 “We simply do not trust the Americans” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi to RT “How can a nation built on arrogance and colonialism respect others or honor its agreements?”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们根本不信任美国人” —— 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）对RT表示：“一个建立在傲慢和殖民主义基础上的国家，怎么可能尊重他人或遵守其协议？”

text: 🇮🇷 Current status of ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the end of Islamabad negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰堡谈判结束后，霍尔木兹海峡船只的当前状态。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）周边地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 Chinese workers at a Rosneft refinery in Komsomolsk-on-Amur, Russia’s Far East, have gone on strike over unpaid wages, holding signs reading “Putin, help us.” ▪️ The protest is taking place under police supervision, with no detentions or fines reported so far. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 俄罗斯远东阿穆尔河畔共青城的俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）炼油厂的中国工人因工资被拖欠而举行罢工，他们举着写有“普京，帮帮我们”的标语。 ▪️ 抗议活动在警方监督下进行，目前尚未有拘留或罚款的报告。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 Five parties are participating in Hungary’s parliamentary elections, but the main contest is between the opposition Tisza and the ruling Fidesz. ▪️ Voter turnout is relatively high, with queues already forming at some polling stations in Budapest. ▪️ Final vote counting is expected to be completed no later than April 18. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 五个政党参加了匈牙利的议会选举，但主要的竞争是在反对党蒂萨党和执政的青民盟之间。 ▪️ 选民投票率相对较高，布达佩斯的一些投票站已经排起了长队。 ▪️ 最终计票预计不迟于4月18日完成。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Ukraine will open the "Druzhba" oil pipeline immediately after the elections in Hungary, Orban believes. "We will win the elections and the next morning, the Ukrainians will open it," he told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 欧尔班认为，乌克兰将在匈牙利选举后立即开放“友谊”（Druzhba）输油管道。“我们将赢得选举，第二天早上，乌克兰人就会开放它，”他告诉俄新社。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Saudi Arabia's east-west oil pipeline, which bypasses the Strait of Hormuz, is again functioning at full capacity of 7 million barrels a day. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 沙特阿拉伯绕过霍尔木兹海峡的东西向输油管道再次以每天700万桶的满负荷运转。 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine’s General Staff says Russia racked up 2,299 ceasefire violations from 4 pm to 7 am, including 28 assaults, 479 shelling incidents and 1,792 Lancet, Molniya and FPV strikes. No missiles, glide bombs or Shaheds. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 An hour after the truce began, Russian propagandists predictably claim "Ukraine broke it by hitting Nova Kakhovka." https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部表示，从下午4点到上午7点，俄罗斯违反停火协议2,299次，包括28次突击、479次炮击和1,792次柳叶刀（Lancet）、闪电（Molniya）和FPV无人机袭击。没有导弹、滑翔炸弹或沙赫德（Shahed）无人机。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 停火开始一小时后，俄罗斯宣传人员不出所料地声称“乌克兰通过袭击新卡霍夫卡破坏了停火。” https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan sends 13,000 troops and 10 to 18 fighter jets, along with support aircraft to King Abdulaziz Air Base, Saudi Arabia - Saudi MOD tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦向沙特阿拉伯阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地派遣了13,000名士兵和10至18架战斗机，以及支援飞机 - 沙特国防部 推文

text: Open Source Intel NYT Report: Iran’s parliament Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf met face to face with Vice President JD Vance and shook hands during the talks. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《纽约时报》报道：伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf）在会谈期间与副总统JD·万斯（JD Vance）面对面会晤并握手。 推文

text: WarTranslated Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 3.46% by 7 AM, a record and nearly double the same hour four years ago. The main race is Fidesz vs Tisza with Peter Magyar leading in polls, a pivotal vote for Hungary and for Orban. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利议会选举上午7点的投票率达到3.46%，创下历史新高，几乎是四年前同一时间的双倍。主要竞争是青民盟对阵蒂萨党，彼得·马扎尔在民调中领先，这对匈牙利和欧尔班来说是一次关键的投票。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 匈牙利议会选举已经开始。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Kyiv says Russia committed 2,299 violations of the Easter ceasefire, while Moscow claims Ukraine violated it 1,971 times.
text_zh: 基辅称俄罗斯违反复活节停火协议2,299次，而莫斯科声称乌克兰违反了1,971次。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 At least 30 people died in a stampede at Haiti’s Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot after a gathering promoted on TikTok, which drew a large crowd including school-age children as young as 12. Heavy rain reportedly triggered panic during the event. Officials say most of the victims died from asphyxiation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 在TikTok上宣传的一次聚会后，海地米洛（Milot）的拉费里埃城堡（Citadelle Laferrière）发生踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡，聚会吸引了包括低至12岁的学龄儿童在内的大量人群。据报道，大雨在活动期间引发了恐慌。官员称大多数受害者死于窒息。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel At least 30 people, many of them school-age children as young as 12, were killed in a stampede at the Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot, Haiti, after heavy rains triggered panic at a gathering advertised on TikTok, the Miami Herald reports, citing local officials. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据《迈阿密先驱报》援引当地官员的话报道，在海地米洛的拉费里埃城堡，由于大雨引发了TikTok上宣传的聚会恐慌，造成至少30人死亡，其中许多是低至12岁的学龄儿童。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump after talks with Iran breakdown: “The trump card president holds if Iran won’t bend: a navel blockade” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043222148664250630/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统在与伊朗会谈破裂后表示：“如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中的王牌：海军封锁” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043222148664250630/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 👊 🇮🇷 Donald Trump has proposed a naval blockade against Iran following failed negotiations in Islamabad between the U.S. and Iran. ▪️ He suggested the U.S. could respond to Iran’s control over the Strait of Hormuz by imposing its own blockade. ▪️ The U.S. Navy could potentially assert control over maritime traffic in the strait, effectively restricting movement along this critical global oil route. ▪️ The proposal comes amid broader warnings from Trump after the collapse of talks, while Pakistan continues mediation efforts and urges both sides to maintain the ceasefire despite rising tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 👊 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普在美伊伊斯兰堡谈判失败后提议对伊朗实施海军封锁。 ▪️ 他建议美国可以通过实施自己的封锁来回应伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制。 ▪️ 美国海军可能主张对海峡的海上交通进行控制，从而有效地限制这一关键全球石油航线的通行。 ▪️ 在会谈破裂后，特朗普发出了更广泛的警告，而巴基斯坦继续进行调解努力，并敦促双方尽管霍尔木兹海峡周围紧张局势加剧，仍要维持停火。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国“要求过多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要的症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗浓缩铀的权利以及“其他问题”。国家电视台报道称：“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和不合理要求阻碍了会谈的推进。”

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：准确地说，他们在这里拒绝了什么？JD·万斯：我们需要看到他们做出肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：美伊会谈失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼（Mark Carney）：我们军队将每一美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束了。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD·万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，那都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗人弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议——我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更糟糕的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在佛罗里达州参加了一场UFC赛事，而与伊朗的会谈在巴基斯坦破裂。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方继续遵守停火协议。

text: Trump reposts after failed talks with Iran: The Trump card the president holds if Iran won’t bend: a naval blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普在与伊朗会谈失败后转发：如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中的王牌：海军封锁。

text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，由于战争持续数周后存在“不信任气氛”，因此对与美国达成协议不抱期望。他说：“我们不应该期望在一次会议上就达成协议”，并补充说，虽然找到了一些共同点，“但在两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧。”

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布，根据其联合战略防御协议，向东部地区的阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地部署约13,000名巴基斯坦士兵和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举动，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对一国的攻击将被视为对另一国的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: After 21 hours of negotiations in Pakistan, JD Vance said the U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement. He said the U.S. made its terms clear, but Iran did not accept them.
text_zh: 在巴基斯坦进行了21小时的谈判后，JD·万斯表示美伊未能达成协议。他说美国明确了自己的条件，但伊朗没有接受。

text: 🇭🇺 Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举已经开始 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🚩 April 1961: Moscow metro passengers reading newspaper reports of Yury Gagarin's space flight. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🚩 1961年4月：莫斯科地铁乘客阅读关于尤里·加加林（Yury Gagarin）太空飞行的报纸报道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇳 Russia does not yet have a preference for a candidate for the post of the new UN Secretary-General. The election campaign is just gaining momentum, Kirill Logvinov, the director of the Department of International Organizations of the Russian Foreign Ministry, told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇳 俄罗斯外交部国际组织司司长基里尔·洛格维诺夫（Kirill Logvinov）告诉俄新社，俄罗斯目前还没有新任联合国秘书长职位的首选候选人。竞选活动才刚刚开始。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 实时平均美国政权智商：“卡利巴夫说，我再次觉得很有趣，因为他说我们拒绝放弃浓缩权利。我心想，你知道吗？我妻子有跳伞的权利……”

text: While the war may resume at any moment, it’s important to reiterate that the U.S. has no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure (terrorism). The world is now starting to feel the effects of the Hormuz blockade, but there’s still another card Iran hasn’t activated yet; the Bab al-Mandeb. Iran’s allies in Yemen (Ansarallah) have already demonstrated their ability to shut down the Bab al-Mandeb Strait from 2023 to 2025 in response to the Israeli genocide in Gaza, which both Biden and Trump attempted to reopen but failed, miserably.
text_zh: 虽然战争可能随时恢复，但必须重申，除了轰炸民用基础设施（恐怖主义）外，美国已无牌可打。世界现在开始感受到霍尔木兹封锁的影响，但伊朗还有一张牌尚未激活；曼德海峡。伊朗在也门的盟友（胡塞武装）已经证明了他们有能力在2023年至2025年期间关闭曼德海峡，以回应以色列在加沙的种族灭绝，拜登和特朗普都试图重新开放，但都惨败了。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump’s first social media post following failed peace talks with Iran is a link to an article suggesting a possible naval blockade on Iran if it does not comply with U.S. demands. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在与伊朗和平谈判失败后的第一条社交媒体帖子是一个链接，文章暗示如果伊朗不遵守美国的要求，可能会对伊朗实施海军封锁。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said it carried out a strike overnight on a Hezbollah rocket launcher in southern Lebanon that was loaded and ready to fire toward Israel. The launcher was identified in the Juwaya area and was destroyed in a rapid strike before it could be launched. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，昨晚对黎巴嫩南部的一个真主党火箭发射器进行了打击，该发射器已装弹并准备向以色列发射。发射器在朱瓦亚（Juwaya）地区被发现，并在发射前被迅速摧毁。 @wfwitness
